chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No.D-4840 of 2023 Muhammad Iqbal Versus Muhammad Amir and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For orders as to maintainability of petition..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 17.01.2024 Mr. Moulvi Iqbal Haider, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner has been instructed not to press this petition. The petition is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
